name: Franchise Architect: Football
currentFocus: Session 46 shipped complete player truth and usage realism: Potential visibility, merit/availability snap allocation, exclusive QB/K/P roles, living dossiers, expanded observed box scores, broadcast Impact Index, milestone questlines, and a verified all-actions contract net.

blockers: Launch/SPARKED remains evidence-gated until football@playfranchisearchitect.com forwarding/copying is verified with a real received-message receipt and current live origin/routing proves playfranchisearchitect.com serves the latest build.

testSuiteStatus.coverage: Session 46 verified final tree with direct canonical shards 317/317 (core 64/64, runtime 146/146, sim-contract 67/67, sim-realism 1/1, studio 39/39), direct Playwright UI 18/18, focused Session 46 suites 24/24, syntax checks for every touched JavaScript module, Pages build/smoke, windows-hide, Wave guard, secrets audit, blocker preflight, canon conformance 0 gaps, release/cost gates allowed cost-neutral, and doctor no items.
testSuiteStatus.uiSuiteNote: Session 46 direct npx playwright test passed 18/18, including trusted Commissioner feedback, player dossier, broadcast box score, depth automation, and both theme palettes.

highlights: Priority Inbox (CRITICAL/IMPORTANT/FLAVOR tiers, bell badge, slide-in drawer)
Live Sim-Watch overlay (300ms animated drive log, key play cards)
Franchise Moment card (cinematic post-game drama + share button)
GM Decision modal (pre-advance choices on critical weeks)
Cap War Room (4-year visual cap timeline, color-coded risk zones)
Trade Breakdown card (A-F letter grades, fairness verdict)
Season Narrative Arcs (3 dynamic story threads per season)
GM Persona progress bar + confetti tier-up burst
SimJob TTL cleanup (10-min eviction, prevents OOM)
5 new API endpoints (season-arcs, gm-decision, records/franchise, team-archetypes, franchise-moment)
Mobile 375px overflow fixes across all new modals

freeTierAuditNote: Verified S138 #753: pure browser game, no LLM/email/per-user backend calls. Static deploy.
